---
title: "Yixin Cao"
image: "files/profile_pic.jpg"
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      href: mailto:yixincao615@gmail.com
    - icon: linkedin
      href: www.linkedin.com/in/yixin-cao-874bb3294
---

Welcome to my website!

I am Yixin Cao, a student interested in business analytics, data analysis, and problem solving with data. I enjoy using quantitative methods to turn raw data into useful business insights.

My academic interests include customer analytics, forecasting, machine learning, and data visualization. I am especially interested in applying analytics to real business problems and making data-driven decisions.

## Skills
- Python
- SQL
- Excel
- Tableau / Power BI
- Data cleaning
- Statistical analysis
- Machine learning

## Current Focus
I am currently working on projects involving exploratory data analysis, modeling, and business problem solving. This website highlights my background, resume, and selected projects.
